name: Cuisine D'or Cheesecake (Aka Oreo Cheesecake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients together and press into the bottom of a 10-inch springform pan, covering the sides. Refrigerate for about 30 minutes.
2. OREO FILLING
- 2 pounds cream cheese, room temperature
- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 4 large eggs
- 2 egg yolks
- 1/3 cup whipping cream
- 2 teaspoons vanilla
- 1 1/2 cups coarsely chopped Oreo cookies
- 2 cups sour cream
Preheat oven to 425°F.
Beat the cream cheese in a large bowl until smooth. Beat in 1-1/4 cups sugar and flour until well blended. Beat in eggs and egg yolks until mixture is smooth. Stir in cream and 1 teaspoon vanilla.
Pour half of batter into prepared crust. Sprinkle with chopped Oreos. Pour remaining batter over, smoothing with a spatula.
Bake for 15 minutes. Reduce temperature to 225°F and bake an additional 50 minutes, covering the top loosely with foil if it is browning too quickly. Increase oven temperature to 350°F.
Blend sour cream, remaining 1/4 cup sugar, and remaining 1 teaspoon vanilla. Spread over cheesecake.
Bake for 7 minutes. Refrigerate immediately. Cover cake with plastic wrap and chill overnight.
3. SWISS FUDGE GLAZE
- 1 cup whipping cream
- 8 ounces chopped semi-sweet chocolate
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
